items.title: Veliki preokret oko Vuškovića: Ipak će mu se ostvariti želja?
items.summary: Luka Vušković mogao bi ostati u Hamburgu. Engleski mediji pišu da mu Tottenham nudi novi ugovor i posudbu natrag. Njegova želja? Igrati s bratom Mariom u HSV-u, a san bi mu se mogao ostvariti

items.title: Vatreni jači za još dva igrača: Fruk i Pašalić zapeli u 'ševi', Kramarić trenira punim gasom!
items.summary: Matanović, Šutalo i Erlić su se u 'ševi' dodavali glavama, Fruk i Pašalić su bili bespomoćni. Perišić već ide kao raketa, a igrački kadar 'vatrenih' sada broji 11 igrača. Sutra bi se ta brojka mogla dodatno povećati...

items.title: London City pursuing Putellas after Barca exit
items.summary: Two-time Ballon d'Or winner Alexia Putellas has announced she is leaving Barcelona after 14 years, with London City Lionesses in pursuit.

items.title: Littler offers Prince William tickets for Worlds
items.summary: Luke Littler offers to provide the tickets for the Prince of Wales for the World Championship at Alexandra Palace later this year.

items.summary: NAKON sjajne sezone u HSV-u, Luka Vušković se vraća u Hamburg na novu posudbu.

items.title: Norrie's French Open ends with rare retirement
items.summary: Cameron Norrie suffers heartbreak at the French Open as he retires injured from his first-round match - the first time he has done so at a Grand Slam.

items.title: Bennacer šokiran nakon što je ostao bez poziva za SP: Neću lagati, ne razumijem
items.summary: ALŽIRSKI veznjak Ismaël Bennacer izrazio je nerazumijevanje i razočaranje odlukom izbornika da ga izostavi s popisa za SP.

items.title: Shankland completes 'dream' move to Rangers from Hearts
items.summary: Scotland striker Lawrence Shankland says he is fulfilling his "dream" of joining "boyhood club" Rangers as he completes his transfer from Scottish Premiership rivals Heart of Midlothian.

items.title: How are French Open stars coping with Paris 'heat dome'?
items.summary: With temperatures reaching 34C at the French Open, players are having to tweak their games to deal with firmer courts, higher bounces and the heat.

items.title: Vingegaard dominates as tempers fray on hot Giro stage
items.summary: Denmark's two-time Tour de France champion Jonas Vingegaard dominates the mountainous stage 16 of the Giro d'Italia to increase his overall lead in the pink jersey.
